instruction: Please get the incident update to #general on discord, check the incident next step on the board first to see whether it is already there, add only the missing piece, and send alice@example.com a recap when it's handled.
canonical_instruction: I need the incident update out to #general on discord. Please look over what's already being tracked on the board, confirm whether the incident next step is already there, fill only the missing piece, and send alice@example.com a quick recap once it's handled.
instruction_variants: Can you post the incident update to #general on discord? Check what's already being tracked on the board, fill only the missing piece, and send alice@example.com a recap.
Please get the incident update out to #general on discord, look over the incident next step on the board, fill only the missing piece, and send alice@example.com a recap.
Can you handle the incident update for #general on discord? Review what's already being tracked on the board, add only the missing piece, and send alice@example.com a quick recap.
Please push the incident update to #general on discord, check whether the incident next step is already on the board, fill only the missing piece, and send alice@example.com a short recap.

I need the incident update out to #general on discord. Please look over what's already being tracked on the board, confirm whether the incident next step is already there, fill only the missing piece, and send alice@example.com a quick recap once it's handled.

The incident update still needs to reach #general on discord. Please review what's already being tracked on the board, confirm whether the incident next step is already there, fill only the missing piece, and send alice@example.com a quick recap afterward.
Please handle the incident update for #general on discord, look over the incident next step on the board, add only the missing piece, and send alice@example.com a short recap when it's done.

hidden_constraints.value: The escalation is posted and being tracked.

solution_commands: openclaw message send --channel discord --target #general --message 'Incident escalation started. Please acknowledge.'
email send --to alice@example.com --subject 'Incident escalation recap' --body 'The escalation is posted and being tracked.'
